description: Step-by-step guide for AI agents to initialize and use this skill pack.

steps.objective: Install deps and compile contracts. (Deploy optional).
steps.note: If deployment skips due to missing PRIVATE_KEY, the skill will proceed in 'Simple Mode' (Bundling individual transfers). This is acceptable.

steps.objective: Call POST http://localhost:3000/skill/multi_send with target token and recipients.
steps.note: The response contains 'to' and 'data' for the TEE wallet to sign and broadcast.

agent_guardrails.never_bypass: Do not use standard send transactions for batching.
agent_guardrails.network: Ensure RPC is connected to X Layer (Chain ID 196).
agent_guardrails.approvals: Ensure the caller has approved the MultiSend contract for the token.
